Live Web System (ADHD Eye): Standard RGB Webcam camera (uncontrolled visual environments)
Significance of Domain Shift: CRITICAL. The reference tracker captures physical pupil boundaries; webcam maps pixel coordinate landmarks.
CRITICAL. A 40Hz sampling rate cannot capture fine micro-saccades or high-frequency pupil diameter changes.
MEDIUM. Explores working memory encoding under different cognitive load times.
HIGH. Mismatches in reaction times affect features (Mean, SD, CV) making models trained on reference data incompatible with live data.
HIGH. Fewer trials increase variance and susceptibility to outliers.
